title: Object Faberge Egg Material Jewels Precious Metals

prompt:
OBJECT=a Faberge Egg
MATERIAL=jewels and precious metals CONNECTOR_INSTRUCTION=in BASE_MATERIAL=a white ceramic egg cup on a small sunny kitchen table

Do not use any painted colors or other items to create the [OBJECT].
